ip_outcome_note: Vision flagged background figure (orange gi, raised arms) as Son Goku at medium confidence. Refuted: this is an Extra/item card named 'Senzu Bean' — the card type and name confirm the compositional anchor is the item, not a named character. The background figure is an anonymous celebrant framing the sack. No character IP attribution is warranted for an item card with an unnamed background figure.

trivia_bullets.text: Senzu Bean is a healing item from Dragon Ball canon, grown by Korin (an 800-year-old martial artist cat) exclusively in his tower. A single bean fully restores health, stamina, and ki, and sustains a person for ten days. Supply is scarce — notable rationing throughout Z-Fighters battles. First appeared in the Commander Red Saga of the original Dragon Ball series.
sources: CBR: Dragon Ball Super Senzu Beans Explained

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-053 is an Extra card (Blue, cost 1). Effect: choose up to 1 of your cards; it gains +5000 power for the turn; then switch up to 2 of your energy to Active Mode. Received an official errata from Bandai: post-errata, activation is restricted to the opponent's turn only, closing an exploit where the energy-refresh effect could be chained on your own turn in Zenkai-era loops.
sources: WebSearch: DBS Card Game official errata page BT1-053

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-053 originally appeared in Galactic Battle (DBS-B01), the game's launch set (2017). This copy is the Mythic Booster (MB-01, 2020) reprint — one of 63 curated reprints in that set, each with new alternate art and gold stamp. The Mythic Booster was the first DBS set to offer Secret Rare reprints.
sources: WebSearch: Mythic Booster MB01 set overview
WebSearch: House Rules Gaming Senzu Bean reprint
